title: rubus centronotus
intro: Rubus centronotus, also known as the Himalayan Raspberry, is a plant species belonging to the Rosaceae family. The medicinal properties of Rubus centronotus include its high antioxidant content and anti-inflammatory properties, which make it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of diarrhea and dysentery. The herbal preparations of Rubus centronotus include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
